sections.title: 1. Purpose of Collection and Use of Personal Information
sections.body:
• Provision of membership registration and login services
• Management of subscription services
• Service improvement and bug fixes

※ Learning records, practice statistics, exam results, and similar data are stored locally on the user's device only and are not collected by our servers.

sections.title: 2. Personal Information Collected
sections.body:
[Required]
• Email address: collected via Google Sign-In
• Display name: Google account name or user-entered name

[Information provided via Google Sign-In]
• Google account email, name, and profile photo URL
• Profile photo URL is stored on our servers and used to display your profile within the app

[Automatically collected]
• Subscription information: plan type (Free/Pro), subscription expiry date

[Information not collected]
• Location data, contacts, photos/media, device unique identifiers

sections.title: 3. Retention Period
sections.body:
• Server data is deleted immediately upon account deletion
• Local device data (practice records, exam results, learning statistics, etc.) is also deleted upon account deletion and cannot be recovered as it is not backed up to our servers
• Contract and payment records under the Act on the Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce: 5 years
• Log records under the Protection of Communications Secrets Act: 3 months

sections.title: 4. Disclosure to Third Parties
sections.body:
As a general rule, personal information is not disclosed to external parties.
• Exception when the user has given prior consent
• Exception when required by applicable law

sections.title: 5. Outsourcing of Personal Data Processing
sections.body:
• Supabase Inc. — Database hosting and authentication services
• RevenueCat Inc. — Subscription payment management and receipt verification
• Apple Inc. / Google LLC — In-app purchase processing

sections.title: 6. User Rights
sections.body:
• Access to personal information: available via the Profile screen within the app
• Correction of personal information: change of display name
• Account deletion: available via the Profile screen within the app
• Withdrawal of consent: consent is withdrawn upon account deletion

sections.title: 7. Security Measures
sections.body:
• Database access control (Row Level Security)
• HTTPS communication encryption
• Data access management based on the principle of least privilege

sections.title: 8. Data Protection Officer
sections.body:
• Officer: Jisu Lim
• Contact: 4ltree.service@gmail.com

sections.title: 9. Changes to Privacy Policy
sections.body: This policy may be revised in accordance with changes in law, policy, or services. Users will be notified of any changes through in-app announcements.

sections.title: Article 1 (Purpose)
sections.body: These Terms of Service govern the conditions and procedures for using the ear training service provided by MelodyGen.

sections.title: Article 2 (Definitions)
sections.body:
• Service: all features provided by the app, including ear training practice, mock exams, and learning statistics
• User: a person who has registered an account and uses the Service
• Paid Service (Pro): premium features accessible through a monthly subscription

sections.title: Article 3 (Service Description)
sections.body:
• Ear training practice across 6 categories (melody, rhythm, interval, harmony, tonality, two-part)
• Mock exams and result analysis
• Learning statistics and progress tracking
• Automatically generated exercises

sections.title: Article 3-2 (Data Storage)
sections.body:
• Learning-related data, including practice records, mock exam results, learning statistics, and skill profiles, are stored locally on the user's device.
• Local data is not backed up to our servers and will be permanently lost if the app is deleted, the device is reset, or the cache is cleared.
• Only account information (email, display name, subscription status) is stored on our servers.
• Local data is stored separately per account; data belonging to other accounts cannot be accessed.

sections.title: Article 4 (Formation of Agreement)
sections.body:
• A service agreement is formed when the user consents to these Terms and completes registration.
• Registration may be refused if a user misappropriates another person's information or provides false information.

sections.title: Article 5 (Paid Services)
sections.body:
• The Pro subscription is KRW 5,500 per month and is billed through the App Store or Google Play.
• Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled.
• Refunds are subject to the refund policy of the respective store.
• Pro features remain accessible until the expiry date even after cancellation.

sections.title: Article 6 (User Obligations)
sections.body:
Users must not engage in the following conduct:
• Using the Service through unauthorized or fraudulent means
• Circumventing the app's technical protection measures
• Collecting personal information of other users
• Interfering with the stable operation of the Service

sections.title: Article 7 (Service Interruption)
sections.body:
• The Service may be temporarily suspended for reasons such as system maintenance or equipment replacement.
• The Service may be restricted in cases of force majeure, including natural disasters, that render provision of the Service impossible.

sections.title: Article 8 (Content Characteristics)
sections.body:
• Exercises are automatically generated by algorithm and may differ from exercises created by professional instructors.
• The app is a supplementary practice tool and does not replace professional instruction.
• Exam results and learning statistics are for reference purposes only and do not guarantee actual admission exam scores.

sections.title: Article 9 (Disclaimer)
sections.body:
• We are not liable for service disruptions attributable to the user's own fault.
• No separate warranty is provided for services offered free of charge.
• We are not liable for learning outcomes obtained by users through use of the Service.

sections.title: Article 10 (Account Deletion)
sections.body:
• Users may delete their account (withdraw membership) at any time from within the app.
• Upon account deletion, personal information stored on our servers (email, display name, subscription status) is deleted immediately.
• Local data stored on the device (practice records, mock exam results, learning statistics, mascot experience points, etc.) is also deleted.
• All deleted data, whether on the server or device, cannot be recovered.
• Deleting your account does not automatically cancel a Pro subscription on the App Store or Google Play. You must cancel the subscription directly in the respective store to prevent further charges.

sections.title: Article 11 (Dispute Resolution)
sections.body:
• Disputes arising from the use of the Service shall be resolved in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea.
• The court with jurisdiction over the location of the Service provider shall serve as the competent court in the event of a dispute.

sections.title: Article 12 (Amendment of Terms)
sections.body:
• These Terms may be amended to the extent permitted by applicable law.
• Amended Terms will be announced within the app no later than 7 days before they take effect.
